name: playwright-automation-engine
description: A rule-driven browser automation engine using Playwright for Node.js

scripts.api: cd api && npm install && npm start
scripts.ui: cd autobot-ui && npm install && ng serve
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd api && npm install && cd ../autobot-ui && npm install
scripts.env:dev: echo Environment configuration is now managed directly in .env file
scripts.env:staging: echo Environment configuration is now managed directly in .env file
scripts.env:prod: echo Environment configuration is now managed directly in .env file
scripts.env:test: echo Environment configuration is now managed directly in .env file
